title: Welcome to AeroSocial Agent

hero.title: Schedule Smarter. Post Faster. Grow Everywhere.
hero.subtitle: AI-powered social media management — generate, schedule, and publish content across all your platforms from one dashboard.

features.title: Everything you need to dominate social media
features.subtitle: Powerful tools to create, schedule, and analyze your content across all platforms

items.title: AI Content Generation
items.description: Generate engaging captions, hashtags, and post ideas with the power of AI in seconds.

items.title: Multi-Platform Scheduling
items.description: Schedule posts across Instagram, Twitter, LinkedIn, TikTok and more from one calendar.

items.title: Smart Analytics
items.description: Track engagement, impressions, and follower growth with beautiful visual reports.

items.title: Team Collaboration
items.description: Invite team members, review drafts, and manage approvals seamlessly.

items.title: AI Auto-Reply
items.description: Set up smart auto-replies that handle customer queries 24/7 with natural language.

items.title: Cross-Platform Integration
items.description: Connect all your social accounts and manage everything from a single dashboard.

howItWorks.title: Get started in 3 simple steps
howItWorks.subtitle: From zero to scheduled in minutes
howItWorks.step1Desc: Link your social media profiles — Instagram, Twitter, LinkedIn, TikTok, and more. One-click OAuth setup.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Write or generate posts using AI. Customize tone, add media, and preview before publishing.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Set your ideal posting times. Auto-publish or review drafts. Let AeroSocial Agent handle the rest.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: No hidden fees. No surprises. Cancel anytime.

items.name: Sarah Chen
items.content: AeroSocial Agent has transformed my workflow. I went from spending 10 hours a week on scheduling to just 30 minutes. The AI captions are uncanny.

items.name: Marcus Johnson
items.content: Managing 5 clients used to be a nightmare. Now I handle everything from one dashboard. The analytics alone saved me hours of reporting.

items.name: Aisha Patel
items.content: The AI auto-reply feature is a game changer for our customer support. Our response time dropped from 24 hours to under 5 minutes.

items.name: Tomás García
items.content: We scaled our social presence from 0 to 50K followers in 3 months. The scheduling and analytics tools gave us the edge we needed.

items.name: Emily Watson
items.content: The multi-platform scheduling is flawless. I love that I can preview how my posts will look on each platform before publishing.

items.a: We support Instagram, Twitter/X, LinkedIn, Facebook, TikTok, YouTube, Pinterest, Threads, Bluesky, Mastodon, and Telegram. More platforms are added regularly.

items.q: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
items.a: Absolutely. There are no long-term contracts. You can upgrade, downgrade, or cancel your subscription at any time. Your data remains yours.

items.q: How does the AI content generation work?
items.a: Our AI uses advanced language models trained on high-performing social content. Just provide a topic or keywords, and it generates engaging captions, hashtags, and post ideas tailored to your brand voice.

items.q: Is there a free trial for paid plans?
items.a: Yes! You can try the Pro plan free for 14 days with no credit card required. Experience all features before committing.

items.q: Can I collaborate with my team?
items.a: Absolutely. The Business plan includes team collaboration features — invite members, assign roles, review drafts, and manage approvals in one place.
We take security seriously. All data is encrypted in transit and at rest. We use enterprise-grade infrastructure and never share your data with third parties.

footer.description: AI-powered social media management for creators, teams, and agencies. Schedule smarter, post faster, grow everywhere.
